method: Novel competitive-programming problems generated from scratch (disjoint from LiveCodeBench/Codeforces/LeetCode). Per item: invent statement -> write Python reference solution -> craft 6-12 normal+edge test inputs -> EXECUTE reference in isolated subprocess (uv run python, mktemp temp dir, 5s/run timeout) to derive expected outputs (the gold) -> weak-test check (a trivially-wrong solution such as print 0 / echo input must FAIL >=1 test) -> KEEP only if reference ran cleanly on ALL tests (gold_confidence=1.0). JSONL written incrementally with flush+fsync per kept item (crash-safe). Final independent audit re-executed every reference against all 566 stored inputs: 0 mismatches. verifier=code_exec, io=stdin_stdout.
reexec_audit: PASS (0 mismatches across all stored tests)
